title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: LA PINE COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: acute care treatment, general medical exams, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, and drug and alcohol assessment. Also offers assistance enrolling and re-enrolling in OHP. 51600 Huntington Road Suite 101 La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturdays 9am-1pm (541) 536-3435 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-3435 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available to individuals with high deductibles or no insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income for those applying for the sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Klamath, and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Pediatrics Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA PINE COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER
